title: Healthy Eating for Everyone
passage:
Healthy Eating

Eating healthy is important for everyone. It helps us feel good and stay strong. A healthy diet includes fruits, vegetables, whole grains, and proteins like meat and beans. We should eat different foods every day. This helps our bodies get all the vitamins and minerals they need.

Fruits and vegetables are very good for us. We should eat at least five servings a day. Apples, bananas, carrots, and spinach are great choices. Whole grains like brown rice and whole wheat bread give us energy.

Drinking water is also important. We should drink at least eight glasses of water every day. Water keeps us hydrated and helps our bodies work well.

It is good to eat meals at regular times. Breakfast is very important. It gives us energy for the day. Lunch should be healthy, too, with plenty of vegetables. Dinner can be a little lighter.

Snacks can be healthy, too. Instead of chips or candy, we can eat nuts, yogurt, or fruit. This way, we stay healthy and feel good!

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.explanation: A healthy diet includes fruits and vegetables, as mentioned in the passage.

questions.text: We should eat five servings of meat every day.
questions.explanation: The passage states we should eat five servings of fruits and vegetables, not meat.

questions.text: What should we drink every day?
questions.explanation: The passage says we should drink at least eight glasses of water every day.
The passage states that breakfast is very important for energy.

an amount of food for one person
having enough water in the body
the strength and vitality required for sustained physical or mental activity
